title: more UI changes and performance changes
last_update: Both changes are built and the full test suite passes: the What's New changelog is now kept after the first download and only re-downloaded when a new version exists, and the Feature Request page's buttons have a blank row between rows so Back no longer touches Send Request. Now double-checking the whole branch before handing it over.

log.m: Implemented and green; whole-branch review underway.
